name: url-shortner
description: A 3-tier URL shortener (Next.js + Express + PostgreSQL) built as a DevSecOps portfolio project.

scripts.postinstall: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/db
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,worker -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:worker"
